typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		stage_ncsa_activity_id as string,
		ProjectID as string,
		Project as string,
		ProjectDescription as string,
		Activity as string,
		Description as string,
		ScheduleUnit as string,
		ScheduleResource as string,
		ActivityStatus as string,
		OriginalDuration as string,
		RemainingDuration as string,
		ActualStart as date,
		ActualFinish as date,
		BudgetLaborUnit as string,
		PercentCompleteType as string,
		ExecutedByType as string,
		Prime as string,
		SubPrime as string,
		ScheduleWorkArea as string,
		ExecutedBy as string,
		EarlyStartDate as string,
		EarlyFinishDate as string,
		IsOnCriticalPath as boolean,
		TotalFloat as string,
		StagingReference as string,
		CWP as string,
		CWPDescription as string,
		EWP as string,
		EWPDescription as string,
		dim_entp_project_nk as string,
		S_WorkArea as string,
		PlannedStart as string,
		PlannedFinish as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/CWP/sitepro_cwp.csv']) ~> sourceCWPSiteproStage
sourceCWPSiteproStage derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/CWP/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'sitepro_cwp_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		stage_ncsa_activity_id,
		ProjectID,
		Project,
		ProjectDescription,
		Activity,
		Description,
		ScheduleUnit,
		ScheduleResource,
		ActivityStatus,
		OriginalDuration,
		RemainingDuration,
		ActualStart,
		ActualFinish,
		BudgetLaborUnit,
		PercentCompleteType,
		ExecutedByType,
		Prime,
		SubPrime,
		ScheduleWorkArea,
		ExecutedBy,
		EarlyStartDate,
		EarlyFinishDate,
		IsOnCriticalPath,
		TotalFloat,
		StagingReference,
		CWP,
		CWPDescription,
		EWP,
		EWPDescription,
		dim_entp_project_nk,
		S_WorkArea,
		PlannedStart,
		PlannedFinish,
		FileName
	)) ~> snkCWPSiteproRaw
